#  Drawing Revisions 
#### Summary
As part of the Procore Analytics Project Management Report, the Drawings Revision report page shows detailed information about each drawing revision in each project. Drawings can be selected from the 'Drawing Revision Report' list and previewed directly in the report page under the 'Drawing' visual.
#### Sample Report Page
![Procore Analytics Drawing Revisions](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/85301318b5741fa5d800bfcd37ac0302/7188de6730f62555b15a1cd2dde5af3a/procore-analytics-drawing-revisions.png?fm=webp)
_This sample report page was created using mock data for demonstration purposes only._
